mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ORG_ID , A.ORGNM , A.DMNNM , A.SDTTM , A.EDTTM , A.USEYN , A.ORG_TYCD
, A.LANG_CD , B.PROD_CD
, B.COLR_TMPLT_CD
, B.ORG_TMPLT_ID , B.TOP_LOGO_FILE_ID , B.SBST_LOGO1_FILE_ID , B.SBST_LOGO1_URL , B.SBST_LOGO2_FILE_ID , B.SBST_LOGO2_URL , B.LOGO_FILE_ID , B.HMPG_FTR , B.FTR , B.MENU_VRSN
, A.RPRS_TELNO , A.CHRGRNM , A.MBRID_TYCD , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM
, A.MDFR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = A.MDFR_ID) AS MOD_NM , A.MOD_DTTM , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN SDTTM AND EDTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DURATION_YN , NVL(A.JOIN_USEYN, 'Y') AS JOIN_USEYN FROM TB_LMS_ORG A
LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG_TMPLT B ON A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.list 설 명 : 기관 정보의 전체 목록 */
/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.listPaging 설 명 : 기관 정보의 페이징 목록 */
mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ORG_ID , A.ORGNM , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(C.ACNT_STSCD, 'U', B.USER_ID)) AS USER_STATU_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(C.ACNT_STSCD, 'C', B.USER_ID)) AS USER_STATC_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(C.ACNT_STSCD, 'F', B.USER_ID)) AS USER_STATF_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(C.ACNT_STSCD, 'D', B.USER_ID)) AS USER_STATD_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.KNOW_TYPE, 'DOC', D.KNOW_SN)) AS KNOW_DOC_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.KNOW_TYPE, 'IMG', D.KNOW_SN)) AS KNOW_IMG_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.KNOW_TYPE, 'HTML', D.KNOW_SN)) AS KNOW_HTML_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.KNOW_TYPE, 'LINK', D.KNOW_SN)) AS KNOW_LINK_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.KNOW_TYPE, 'MOV', D.KNOW_SN)) AS KNOW_MOV_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.KNOW_TYPE, 'STD_MOV', D.KNOW_SN, 'STD_DOC', D.KNOW_SN)) AS KNOW_STUDY_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT DECODE(D.ORIGIN_KNOW_SN, NULL, NULL, D.KNOW_SN)) AS SHARE_KNOW_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ORG A, TB_LMS_USR B, TB_HOME_LOGIN C, TB_MIC_KNOW D WHERE A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID(+) AND B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID(+)
AND A.ORG_ID = D.ORG_ID(+) GROUP BY A.ORG_ID, A.ORGNM
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.listSiteStat 설 명 : 사이트 운영 현황의 전체 목록 */
/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.selectKey 설 명 : 기관 정보의 키 값 생성 */ SELECT 'ORG'||LPAD(SQ_ORG_ORG_INFO.nextVal, 7, '0')
/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.selectMenuVersion 설 명 : 기관 정보의 메뉴 버전 */ SELECT MENU_VRSN FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}
/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.selectLogCount 설 명 : 기관의 로그 기록 횟수를 구한다. */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS LOG_CNT FROM TB_LOG_SYS_CONN_LOG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.insertCodeCtgr 설 명 : 기관 생성시 기본 코드 분류를 등록함. */ INSERT INTO TB_ORG_CODE_CTGR ( ORG_ID , CTGRCD , CODE_CTGR_NM , CODE_CTGR_DESC , CODE_CTGR_ODR , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT #{orgId} , CTGRCD , CODE_CTGR_NM , CODE_CTGR_DESC , CODE_CTGR_ODR , USEYN , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_SYS_CODE_CTGR WHERE CTGRCD IN ('USER_DIV_CD','RGN_CD','JOB_CD', 'DEPT_CD')

/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.insertCode 설 명 : 기관 생성시 기본 코드를 등록함. */ INSERT INTO TB_ORG_CODE ( CD , CTGRCD , ORG_ID , CDNM , USEYN , CD_EXPLN , CD_OPTN , CD_SEQ , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT CD , CTGRCD , #{orgId} , CDNM , USEYN , CD_EXPLN , CD_OPTN , CD_SEQ , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_SYS_CODE WHERE CTGRCD IN ('USER_DIV_CD','RGN_CD','JOB_CD', 'DEPT_CD')

/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.insertUserInfoCfg 설 명 : 기관 생성시 사용자 정보 설정을 등록함. */ INSERT INTO TB_ORG_USER_INFO_CFG ( FIELD_NM , ORG_ID , USEYN , REQUIRED_YN , INQYN , BSCYN , VIEW_ODR , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT FIELD_NM , #{orgId} , USEYN , REQUIRED_YN , INQYN , BSCYN , VIEW_ODR , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_ORG_USER_INFO_CFG_MAST

/* SQL ID : OrgOrgInfoDAO.insertKnowCtgr 설 명 : 기관 생성시 지식분류 코드값를 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_ORG_KNOW_CTGR ( ORG_ID , KNOW_CTGR_CD , PAR_KNOW_CTGR_CD , KNOW_CTGR_LVL , KNOW_CTGR_ODR , KNOW_CTGR_NM , KNOW_CTGR_DESC , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT #{orgId} , KNOW_CTGR_CD , PAR_KNOW_CTGR_CD , KNOW_CTGR_LVL , KNOW_CTGR_ODR , KNOW_CTGR_NM , KNOW_CTGR_DESC , USEYN , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_ORG_KNOW_CTGR_MAST
